name: sgs/social-icons
title: SGS Social Icons
description: Row of social media platform icons with links. Supports Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, YouTube, TikTok, WhatsApp, and more, plus a custom-SVG platform for anything else. Configurable size, style, theme-vs-brand colour, and hover colour; open-in-new-tab and optional nofollow; a Site-Info source mode renders the SAME list edited once in Appearance > SGS Site Info everywhere the block is placed (header/footer/drawer). Each icon item shape: { platform: string, url: string, label?: string, customIconUrl?: string, customIconId?: number }. The accessible name (aria-label, WCAG 2.2 SC 4.1.2) is auto-generated per platform (e.g. "Follow us on Instagram") and always operator-editable via the label field.

sgs._imageControlsNote: Deliberate opt-out (FR-36-21). The universal image-controls extension (object-position/max-width/height) targets ONE block-level image; this block's optional custom-SVG upload is a PER-ITEM glyph inside a repeater (mirrors sgs/icon's own imageControls:false). Size is governed by the existing iconSize control instead.

wrapper.label: Wrapper
wrapper._note: Root <div> (render.php get_block_wrapper_attributes, style.css .sgs-social-icons — display:flex is hardcoded CSS, no attribute, so no `layer` is declared and the 12 arrangement members are honestly never asked about). No `layout` box-model attrs beyond padding/margin/gap exist (no width/height/max-width/border/box-shadow control) — honest gaps.

icon.label: Icon
icon._note: Per-item <a class="sgs-social-icons__item"> (render.php, items loop). Only css:color resolves (default convention icon+Colour=iconColour, render.php --sgs-social-colour custom property; colourMode='brand' overrides it per-item via nth-child, FR-36-21). iconSize is a scalar glyph-size control with no cluster member (mirrors sgs/icon-list's iconSize) — an honest orphan, not a gap. No font-size/weight/line-height surface — an icon glyph has no typography.
